overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting a character descending through indoor wooden staircases and covered stone courtyards, then exiting into a foggy, rain-soaked historic city street at night. The scene features gas lamp lighting, horse-drawn carriages, and French Colonial architecture with arched walkways.

fairy lights hanging in the distance providing dim illumination
vertical wooden plank wall with warm brown tones
worn wooden steps descending downward
rough stone wall texture visible on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person descent down a narrow, dimly lit wooden staircase. The environment is entirely indoor with wooden architecture, featuring handrails and plank walls. String lights are visible in the distance, and the atmosphere is quiet and enclosed.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the staircase into a semi-covered stone courtyard illuminated by candles and ambient light. The space features wooden tables, potted plants, and stone archways leading deeper into the building. A balcony with green railings is visible above, and the atmosphere is warm and sheltered from the rain.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dimly lit corridor with stone walls and exposed wooden ceiling beams. Wall lanterns provide warm illumination, and hanging ferns decorate the passage. An iron gate is visible at the far end, suggesting an exit to the outside.

events.description: exits the building through the iron gate into the foggy, rainy street
horse-drawn carriage appears in the distance approaching from the left

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the enclosed corridor onto the rainy street, turning to face the open road

segments.scene_description: The character exits through the iron gate into a foggy, rain-soaked historic street at night. Gas lamps cast warm pools of light on the wet cobblestones. A horse-drawn carriage with glowing lanterns approaches from the distance, and wooden buildings with shuttered windows line the street.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wet cobblestone street as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left. The street is lined with historic two-story buildings featuring balconies, green shutters, and gas lamps. Wooden barrels and raised sidewalks line the right side of the street.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching a brick building with an illuminated exit sign on the right. The street remains foggy and rain-soaked, with gas lamps providing the only light. The horse-drawn carriage has moved out of view, and the environment feels quiet and atmospheric.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a quiet, enclosed wooden interior into a foggy, rain-soaked historic city street at night. It begins by moving down a narrow, dimly lit wooden staircase before emerging into a semi-covered stone courtyard illuminated by candles and potted plants. The camera then pushes through a narrow stone corridor decorated with hanging ferns and wall lanterns, leading directly toward an iron gate. As the character passes through the gate, the environment shifts abruptly to a wet cobblestone street where gas lamps cast warm pools of light through the mist and a horse-drawn carriage passes by. The movement finally continues along the sidewalk past two-story buildings with green shutters, ending as the camera approaches a brick building with an illuminated exit sign.
